releases.description:

releases.description: First beta channel build for testing the new Beta updates flow.

releases.description: Adds the Beta updates setting so users can opt into beta builds while still receiving stable updates, plus hero detail screen refinements.
releases.body: Adds the Beta updates setting so users can opt into beta builds while still receiving stable updates, plus hero detail screen refinements.
